goal: Give JARVIS a read-only understanding of all major SPARTA Brain modules (not only trading) so it can answer 'what does SPARTA Brain do / explain all modules / what is the YouTube builder / Hydra / affiliate / automation / moving company / brain memory / dashboards / roadmap' in executive, operator, and product-demo registers. Read-only only; no execution; no broker/paper/live trading; no YouTube upload; no content-generation job; no file mutation outside approved docs/tests/code; no fake capabilities; unknown/unbuilt modules reported honestly; forbidden commands still refuse.
scope: Additive, read-only. One new pure data+rendering module, two answer call-sites, classifier pattern additions, tests, and docs. No new routes, storage, or execution path.

data_source.type: pure data + rendering, no side effects

call_sites: _jarvis_conversational_answer(q): after the Chief-of-Staff check and BEFORE the briefing/factory/brain/trading/workflow status branches (SAFE_INFO path)
_jarvis_ask_answer(): SAFE_EXPLAIN branch, after the Chief-of-Staff check
answer_wiring.gating: Engages ONLY on all-modules, roadmap, or a definitional/inquiry per-module question, and EXCLUDES status frames (status/progress/how is/update on/state of), so the existing factory/brain/trading/workflow status branches keep their behavior. Imported lazily inside a try/except so any import issue falls through harmlessly.

behavior_after.what_does_sparta_brain_do: All-modules executive overview naming every module + status; ends authorizing no action.
behavior_after.explain_all_modules: Same all-modules overview (classifies SAFE_EXPLAIN; answered via the SAFE_EXPLAIN call-site).
behavior_after.what_is_the_youtube_builder: Per-module read: purpose, status shipped, can/cannot (cannot upload/publish), safety, authorizes no action.
behavior_after.what_is_hydra: Per-module read of the video engine; cannot render/publish from JARVIS.
behavior_after.what_is_the_affiliate_system: Per-module read; no income claims; cannot post/publish/run a campaign.
behavior_after.what_automation_do_we_have: Per-module read of automation scripts; cannot trigger/schedule from JARVIS.
behavior_after.what_is_the_moving_company_workflow: Reported as PLANNED (not built); no invented capability.
behavior_after.what_is_brain_memory: Per-module read of the file-based memory store.
behavior_after.operator_mode: Adds module key, status, and committed location.
behavior_after.product_demo_mode: Plain-language explanation for a customer/investor/friend; still read-only.
behavior_after.status_questions: factory/trading/sparta-brain/workflow status questions still route to their existing branches (knowledge map does not hijack them).
behavior_after.forbidden_commands: upload/publish/generate/run-builder/render and all trading commands still refuse FORBIDDEN (classifier unchanged-first ordering).

test_results.invocation_note: Run from tests/ with PYTHONPATH=.. and --noconftest to avoid a pre-existing corrupt repo-root directory ('hydra ') that breaks pytest root enumeration; unrelated to this change.

commit_note: Awaiting approval per bundle commit policy.
